query:
INSERT INTO rivers (river_id, user_id, river_name, waypoint, description, created_at)
            VALUES (?1, ?2, ?3, ?4, ?5, ?6)
            ON CONFLICT (river_id)
            DO UPDATE SET
                user_id = ?2,
                river_name = ?3,
                waypoint = ?4,
                description = ?5,
                created_at = ?6
            RETURNING river_id;
